content: Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /workspace/database.py:1	import sqlite32	from contextlib import contextmanager3	4	DATABASE = 'urls.db'5	6	def init_db():7	    with get_db() as conn:8	        conn.execute('''9	            CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS urls (10	                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,11	                original_url TEXT NOT NULL,12	                short_code TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,13	                created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP14	            )15	        ''')16	        conn.commit()17	18	@contextmanager19	def get_db():20	    conn = sqlite3.connect(DATABASE)21	    conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row22	    try:23	        yield conn24	    finally:25	        conn.close()
